demographics.living_situation: resident in a residential aged care facility; bedbound during this episode

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My bandage got ripped off when they moved me, it's bleeding all over the sheets, and the raw skin is burning terribly. (Reported at the bedside by the patient with the aged-care nurse assisting the call.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The dressing on the healing wound on her thigh came off during a bed transfer about an hour ago; now the raw area is oozing onto the sheets and the pain is severe. The facility wants advice on getting it cleaned and re-dressed urgently.

symptom_narrative.onset: about one hour ago, when the dressing was pulled off during a transfer in bed
symptom_narrative.duration: since the dressing came off, roughly an hour
symptom_narrative.character: a raw, burning, stinging pain over the whole exposed area, with steady oozing of blood
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — she is wincing, clutching the bed rails and does not want to move the leg
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the front of her right thigh, where the healing wound is
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since the bandage came off; eased a little only when covered
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the area covered and still; the paracetamol she was given barely helped
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement of the leg and exposure of the raw area to the air
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no fever or shivering that she has noticed; she feels sore and distressed but not unwell all over
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the wound has been dressed regularly as part of its normal healing; this is the first time the dressing has come off like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound and unable to reposition herself because of the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a healing surgical wound on the front of the right thigh (a skin-graft donor area) that has been getting regular dressing changes
past_medical_history.how_managed: district/facility nurses change the dressing on a schedule as it heals

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: was given some for the pain a short while ago with only minimal relief

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a residential aged care facility; nursing staff present and assisting with positioning and the call

objective_data_offered.value: a large raw, oozing area on the front of the right thigh roughly the size of a hand (about 10 cm across); blood-stained bed linen underneath
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen over a video call; true depth, wound-bed quality and margins cannot be assessed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: facility nurse relays: blood pressure about 140/85, pulse about 102, temperature 37.0 degrees, oxygen level 98 percent
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: relayed by facility nursing staff using facility equipment; not independently verified by the service

objective_data_offered.value: she looks distressed and is wincing and guarding the leg, but is alert, talking normally and not shivering or confused
